title: Leo Corporation Texture Pack
description: The Leo Corporation Texture Pack for TTRP
body:
**Requires CIT/Optifine**


This texture pack was specifically designed for a group on a roleplay server known as **Tall Tales RP (TTRP)**.

Within the pack are cosmetic items, which offer **no aid** to the user's experiences in the game however will add a nice touch of detail to any world!

This pack likely will not get many updates.



Items:

(paper) Leo Corp Hat

(stick) Leo Corp Cane

(leather horse armor) Leo Corp Staff

(wheat) Orange

(potion) Orange Juice
